title: ficus cocculifolia var. sakalavarum
intro: Ficus cocculifolia var. sakalavarum, also known as the Sakalavary ficus, is a plant species in the family Moraceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus cocculifolia var. sakalavarum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
